caption: A young man with light brown hair, wearing a dark shirt and headphones, is visible in a small picture-in-picture overlay in the bottom-left corner of a video game menu. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands against a background featuring a computer monitor and a decorated Christmas tree. The main screen displays the "STORE" for a sports video game, specifically the "TRAINING" tab. Three player cards are prominently featured with overall ratings of "90 OVR", "85 OVR", and "84 OVR", each labeled "PLAYER". Below these cards, text describes them as "ZERO CHILL PLAYER", "90+ OVR ZERO CHILL PLAYER", and "84+ OVR ALL MADDEN PLAYER", along with associated numerical values such as "20,000", "4,500", and "2,885". The top of the screen shows account balances and the number "91" in a red circle. Throughout the frames, the game menu remains static while the man's facial expressions and hand gestures change as he talks.
